headline: Terms that govern use of Camp Dream GA
subheadline: These terms describe the general rules for using the site, submitting inquiries, and interacting with offers, content, and public resources.

sections.title: Use of the site
sections.description: You agree to use the site for lawful purposes and not to interfere with normal site operation, form handling, security controls, or content availability.

sections.title: Content and offers
sections.description: Program details, pricing ranges, and planning information may evolve over time. Public information is provided to help visitors understand available paths before a final booking or planning agreement is confirmed.

sections.title: Bookings and inquiries
sections.description: Submitting a form or completing a payment does not guarantee acceptance into every experience or custom request. Some offers require further confirmation or planning.

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.description: Site branding, design, content, and original resource materials are protected and should not be reproduced without permission.
